justification: A captures all three projects with correct classifications for two of three (only Custom RTOS Scheduler is misclassified as System/Infrastructure instead of Embedded Systems/IoT/Robotics), and provides rich, concrete impact highlights with specific metrics (2nd place award, ~30% water reduction, <5μs context switch, 50Hz loop). B extracts no projects at all, earning a neutral 3 on project_classification, and captures zero impact highlights, earning a 1 on impact_quality. B's skill list adds vague domain labels ('Embedded Systems', 'Firmware Development', 'Sensor Fusion', 'Real-time Operating Systems') that are category descriptors rather than discrete skills, while also missing FreeRTOS which A omits too — but B includes it correctly. Despite A's one project misclassification and slightly bloated skill list (13 items including hardware components like LiDAR and IMU that blur the skill/tool line), A's comprehensive project extraction and strong impact metrics make it clearly superior overall.
